title: INDIVIDUAL GRIEF COUNSELING SESSIONS - 211info
text: LIVING UNDONE INDIVIDUAL GRIEF COUNSELING SESSIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides individual counseling sessions. 33 NW Louisiana Avenue Bend, OR 97703 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies Email (541) 223-9955 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 223-9955 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website or call for appointment FEES: $125 for 60 minutes or $150 for 90 minutes. Sliding scale fee available. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Deschutes County Services: Bereaved Child Support Groups Bereaved Parent Support Groups General Bereavement and Grief Support Groups Pet Loss Support Groups Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - GRIEF JOURNEY EXTENDED PROGRAM MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - GRIEF TRAVELERS MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - OPEN COMMUNITY CIRCLES MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - TEEN GROUP If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
